title: Fig. 3 in South! Phylogeography of the Antarctic fairy shrimp Branchinecta gaini and its closest Patagonian congener Branchinecta granulosa reveals a long-term association of freshwater fauna with the southern continent
author: Pokorný, Matěj
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Fig. 3 Haplotype networks of Branchinecta granulosa and Branchinecta gaini. Networks were built in PopArt using a TCS method. Circle sizes are proportional to haplotype frequency. Colors in B. gaini and letters in B. granulosa denote geographical regions. The number of mutation steps between the closest haplotypes is indicated by black
steps_raw: Fig. 3 Haplotype networks of Branchinecta granulosa and Branchinecta gaini. Networks were built in PopArt using a TCS method. Circle sizes are proportional to haplotype frequency. Colors in B. gaini and letters in B. granulosa denote geographical regions. The number of mutation steps between the closest haplotypes is indicated by black
